title: Research queue candidate ranking from discovered sources
problem: ticket-139 returns OpenAlex candidate metadata via discover-sources CLI JSON only. Operators cannot rank discovered candidates with domain-pack source_preferences or enqueue them into the research queue for follow-up ingest/fetch decisions.
acceptance_criteria: discover-sources can emit ranked candidates using domain-pack source_preferences overlays (deterministic mocked tests).
Optional --rank-only or queue-sources integration returns structured JSON with credibility/recency signals — no automatic ingest.
No network unless RGE_ALLOW_SOURCE_NETWORK=1 (inherits ticket-139 gate).
No DB writes to accepted sources/claims tables.
Golden tests remain mock-only and pass.
non_goals: Automatic credibility final decisions without operator review.
rollback_plan: Remove ranking overlay from discover-sources output; retain ticket-139 provider path.
